briefdescription.para: General Control register offset.
General Error register offset.
IRQ Enable register offset.
Time Control register offset.
Core Control register offset.
Enable mask.
Register update enable mask.
Reset mask.
Error: End of line early mask.
Error: End of line late mask.
Error: Start of frame early mask.
Error: Start of frame late mask.
All error mask.

sectiondef.header: Time control register bit masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: Image width mask.
Image height mask.
Image height shift.

sectiondef.header: Core control register masks and shifts

briefdescription.para: Input samples mask.
Output samples mask.
No of image segments mask.
No of over- lapping segments mask.
Output samples shift.
No of image segments shift.
No of overlapping segments shift.
Input operation.
Output operation.
This macro reads a value from a Dual Splitter core's register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XDualSplitter core.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XDualSplitter_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value into a Dual Splitter core's register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XDualSplitter core.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDualSplitter_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Callback type for error interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the error. Its value equals 'OR'ing one or more XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK values defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous error interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layer forgot to set the handler. On initialization, error interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered as an error for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the error. Its value equals 'OR'ing one or more XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK values defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Dual Splitter core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the Dual Splitter core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the Dual Splitter core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the Dual Splitter core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This reset effects the core immediately and may cause image tearing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the image size (width x height) of the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
specifies the height of the input image that needs to be set within the range [0, 2160].
specifies the width of the input image that needs to be set within the range [0, 3840].

briefdescription.para: This function gets the image size (width x height) of the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
specifies a pointer to the 16-bit variable that will be filled with height which is in the range [0, 2160].
specifies a pointer to the 16-bit variable that will be filled with width which is in the range [0, 3840].

memberdef.argsstring: (XDualSplitter *InstancePtr, u8 InputSamples, u8 OutputSamples, u8 ImageSegments, u8 Overlap)
memberdef.name: XDualSplitter_SetImgParam

briefdescription.para: This function sets the image parameters to split into multiple segments.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
specifies the number of input samples per clock that needs to be set within the range [0, 4].
specifies the number of output samples per clock that needs to be set within the range [0, 4].
specifies the number of image segments that needs to be set within the range [0, 4].
specifies the overlap of the samples in the segments.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the image parameters of the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
specifies a pointer to the 8-bit variable that will be filled with number of input samples which is in the range [0, 4]
specifies a pointer to the 8-bit variable that will be filled with number of output samples which is in the range [0, 4]
specifies a pointer to the 8-bit variable that will be filled with number of image segments which is in the range [0, 4]
specifies a pointer to the 8-bit variable that will be filled with number of samples overlapping the segments.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to the XDualSplitter_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xdualsplitter_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the Dual Splitter core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XDualSplitter_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xdaulsplitter_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function performs self test on DualSplitter core registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the Dual Splitter core.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt from the GENR_ERROR register, determines the source of the interrupts and calls the respective callbacks for the interrupts that are enabled in IRQ_ENABLE register, and finally clears the interrupts.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this core is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XDualSplitter_SetCallBack() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

simplesect.para: Interrupt should be enabled to execute interrupt handler.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a callback that already has been installed replaces it with the new callback.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
Maximum input samples per clock.
Maximum output samples per clock.
Maximum number of segments in an image.
Maximum image width.
Maximum image height.
This macro commits all the register value changes made so far by the software to the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro prevents the Dual Splitter core from committing recent changes made so far by the software.

detaileddescription.para: When disabled, changes to other configuration registers are stored but do not effect the behavior of the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro enables the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro enables the given individual interrupt(s) on the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

is the bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK bits defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h.

simplesect.para: The existing enabled interrupt(s) will remain enabled. C-style signature: void XDualSplitter_IntrEnable(XDualSplitter *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: This macro disables the given individual interrupt(s) on the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

is the bit-mask of the interrupts to be disabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK bits defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h.

simplesect.para: Any other interrupt not covered by parameter IntrType, if enabled before this macro is called, will remain enabled. C-style signature: void XDualSplitter_IntrDisable(XDualSplitter *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the pending interrupts of the Dual Splitter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.

simplesect.para: The pending interrupts of the Dual Splitter. Use XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK constants defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h to interpret this value. The returned value is a logical AND of the contents of the GENR_ERROR Register and the IRQ_ENABLE Register.

briefdescription.para: This macro clears/acknowledges pending interrupts of the Dual Splitter core.

detaileddescription.para: in the General error register. Bit positions of 1 will be cleared.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDualSplitter core instance.
is the pending interrupts to clear/acknowledge. Use OR'ing of XDUSP_ERR_*_MASK constants defined in xdualsplitter_hw.h to create this parameter value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDualSplitter_IntrClear(XDualSplitter *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This file contains the implementation of the interface functions for Dual Splitter core.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization function for Xilinx Dual Splitter core.
This file contains self test function for the Dual Splitter core.
This file contains interrupt related functions for Xilinx Dual Splitter core.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level driver functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx Dual Splitter core.
Please refer to the header file xdualsplitter.h for more detailed information.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/21/14 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/21/14 Initial release.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xdualsplitter.h for more details of the core.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/21/14 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/21/14 Initial release. 1.00 sha 07/08/15 Defined macro XPAR_XDUALSPLITTER_NUM_INSTANCES if not defined in xparameters.h. 1.1 tu 09/18/17 Removed compilation warning in function XDualSplitter_LookupConfig()
